commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Manual review is needed because the remaining blockers require product and ownership decisions on shared storage identity, migration, session privacy, and SDK contract shape.; Needs attention: The diff changes the memory storage and retrieval boundary for same-workspace agents, including session-source cases.; Review finding: [P1] Align the index identity with the shared-store hash — src/agents/memory-search.... (sha=a69d4f0a2721e009e9725ede71a14173e212cc64)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes memory-search resolution so same-workspace agents use a `state/memory/shared-<hash>.sqlite` store keyed only by workspace, adds a shared-store registry module, and exports new memory-host SDK helpers.

PR surface: Source +136. Total +136 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows the PR routes memory-source configs to a shared DB, while current index identity still hashes `extraPaths` and CLI search does not apply the session-visibility post-filter used by the tool path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual review is needed because the remaining blockers require product and ownership decisions on shared storage identity, migration, session privacy, and SDK contract shape.

target.title: fix(memory): exclude extraPaths from shared scope hash to avoid unnecessary reindexing
target.body:
## Problem

Changing `memorySearch.extraPaths` in agent config creates a new shared memory database (new SHA256 hash), requiring a full reindex. This is a regression from the shared-memory-by-directory design — extra paths are an index scope, not a store identity.

## Solution

`computeSharedScopeHash()` now only depends on `workspaceDir`. The engine already handles incremental indexing when new paths are added to the same store — no need to rehash on extraPaths changes.

New `packages/memory-host-sdk/src/host/shared-store-registry.ts` added for tracking store-to-agent mappings.

## Changes

- **`src/agents/memory-search.ts`**: Remove `extraPaths` from hash; add `sharedStorePath` field; add `resolveAgentWorkspaceDir` import
- **`packages/memory-host-sdk/src/host/shared-store-registry.ts`**: New registry for shared store diagnostics
- **`packages/memory-host-sdk/src/engine-foundation.ts`**: Export `computeSharedScopeHash`
- **`packages/memory-host-sdk/src/engine-storage.ts`**: Export shared store registry helpers

## Upgrade Note

Existing shared databases named `shared-{old-hash}.sqlite` (which included extraPaths) will not match the new hash. Admins should rename the existing DB to the new hash or rebuild.
target.author: xmoxmo
